ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province or state where the business is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the business */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the business is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the business location */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the business was added to the directory */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the business listing was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Primary website of the business */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the business */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the business */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the business */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the business (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business listing is verified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_categories" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Foursquare, Yellow Pages) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., website, directory, API) */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time the source was last synced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_sources" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the business's website */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the website is the primary website of the business */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time the website was last checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the business listing was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the listing */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_keys" (
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "key" TEXT /* Unique key from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_keys_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_keys_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
